reviews.comment:
Las habitaciones estan sucias y no tienen buena calefaccion, luego fui al restaurante pedi una milanesa de pollo algo tan simple como eso , cuando me la trajeron hasta el moso se ruborizo de olor a podrido que tenia cuando la corte. Jamas recomendaria este hotel ni pienso volver personalmente

(Translated by Google)
The rooms are dirty and poorly heated. Then I went to the restaurant and ordered a chicken milanesa—something as simple as that. When it arrived, even the waiter blushed at the rotten smell when I cut it. I would never recommend this hotel, nor do I plan to return.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLc3JLVGpRRRAB
